summary: Outstanding matrix capture of a high‑energy show featuring a fiery first‑set segue and a standout Althea performance.
review: The Seamons matrix delivers crystal‑clear, full‑bodied sound that lets the concert’s energy shine through. Reviewers rave about the electric first set—Jack Straw → Tower → Mama → Mexicali—and highlight Althea, Deal, and Johnny B. Goode as peak moments, while noting a relaxed second half that still recovers its momentum.

ai_rating.rationale: All five reviews are strongly positive (4‑5 stars), praising both the musical performance and the matrix recording quality; no significant criticisms were noted.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple reviewers call the matrix "outstanding", "great sound" and say it brings out the full power of the night with crisp, clean mix; no drop‑outs or muffling reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set praised for its high energy and an interesting segue (Jack Straw → Tower → Mama → Mexicali); second set slows on Not Fade Away/Black Peter but picks up with Johnny B. Goode, ending with a surprise encore of Don't Ease Me In.
